summary.byCategoryNote: Counts reflect REMAINING (non-resolved) findings only. All drift and performance findings resolved.

verification.dba117Verified: 19/19 tables: tenantId NOT NULL + FK to tenants
verification.dba103Verified: teams + team_members: tenantId NOT NULL + FK

resolved_findings.resolution: FIXED — tenantId + Tenant @relation + @@index([tenantId]) added to DealProduct, DealFile, AgentAction. FK constraints applied to DB via migration SQL.
FIXED — ActivityEvent.tenantId changed from String? to String, Tenant @relation added. FK constraint applied to DB.
FIXED — ContactActivity.tenantId changed from String? to String, Tenant @relation added. FK constraint applied to DB.
FIXED — SecurityEvent.tenantId changed from String? to String, Tenant @relation added. FK constraint applied to DB.
FIXED — MessageRecord.tenantId changed from String? to String, Tenant @relation added. FK constraint applied to DB.
FIXED — ToolCallRecord.tenantId changed from String? to String, Tenant @relation added. FK constraint applied to DB.
RECLASSIFIED — Original audit said Team/TeamMember had tenantId in DB but not Prisma. Investigation showed the INVERSE: Prisma has tenantId but DB does NOT. See new finding DBA-103.
FIXED — @@index([slaPolicyId]) added to Ticket, SLABreach, TicketCategory. Indexes applied to DB via migration SQL.
FIXED — @@index([tenantId, createdAt]) and @@index([tenantId, status]) added to AgentAction.
FIXED — @@index([parentVersionId]) added to ChainVersion. CaseDocument already had index.

FIXED — @@index([tenantId, recordedAt]) added to PerformanceMetric and APIUsageRecord. PerformanceMetric.tenantId column created + backfilled + SET NOT NULL in DB. APIUsageRecord FK + indexes applied.
FIXED — Resolved by fixing DBA-003 through DBA-007 (nullable tenantId → non-nullable). Indexes now operate on NOT NULL columns with full selectivity.
FIXED — audit_logs, experiments, experiment_assignments, experiment_results tables created in DB.
FIXED — Duplicate of DBA-118. All 25 models now have Tenant @relation + FK constraints.
FIXED — Duplicate of DBA-117. All 19 models now have tenantId + Tenant @relation in Prisma.
FIXED — teams/team_members tenantId 3-step backfill: add nullable, backfill from first tenant, set NOT NULL + FK + index.
FIXED — actorType text→ActorType enum via safe ALTER COLUMN TYPE USING cast. Audit data preserved.
FIXED — sentAt, sendError, messageId added to Prisma AutoResponseDraft model. DB columns preserved.
FIXED — embedding Unsupported(vector(1536)) and searchVector Unsupported(tsvector) added to Prisma LeadNote. DB columns preserved.
FIXED — tenantId String + Tenant @relation added to all 19 Prisma models. FK constraints applied to DB. Verified: 19/19 tables have tenantId NOT NULL + FK.
FIXED — Tenant @relation added to all 25 models. FK constraints applied to DB.
FIXED — SecurityEvent composite indexes @@index([tenantId, createdAt]) and @@index([tenantId, eventType]) added.
FIXED — Workspace.plan column cast from text to PlanTier enum with USING clause mapping 'free' to 'STARTER'.
FIXED — TicketCategory @@unique([name]) changed to tenant-scoped @@unique([tenantId, name]).
FIXED — Contact @@unique([email]) changed to tenant-scoped @@unique([tenantId, email]).
FIXED — DomainEvent relation renamed from 'tenants' to 'tenant' (singular) for consistency.
FIXED — workspaces.plan text→PlanTier enum with safe USING cast mapping 'free'→'STARTER'.
FIXED — SurveyType→FeedbackType enum renamed with safe swap pattern (create new, cast, drop old).
FIXED — TicketStatus ARCHIVED value added to enum via safe BEGIN/COMMIT block.
FIXED — updatedAt DB defaults dropped; Prisma @updatedAt handles timestamps at ORM layer.
FIXED — lead_activities.description relaxed from NOT NULL to nullable, matching application usage.
FIXED — Missing FK constraints restored for appointment_cases and case_tasks tables.
FIXED — Missing FK constraints restored for TicketActivity.performedById and CaseTask.assignee.
FIXED — auto_response_drafts.leadId FK restored, Tenant and Lead @relation added to Prisma model.
FIXED — ChainVersion self-referential @relation added for parentVersionId.
FIXED — ChainVersionAudit + NotificationDeliveryLog composite indexes added for history queries.
FIXED — Task @@index([opportunityId]) and EscalationHistory @@index([toUserId]) added.
FIXED — AIOutputReview composite indexes @@index([tenantId, status]) and @@index([tenantId, slaDeadline]) added.
FIXED — LeadConversionAudit @@index([contactId]), @@index([accountId]) and AccountHealthScore @@index([accountId, calculatedAt]) added.
FIXED — DomainEvent + WorkflowExecution composite indexes added for common query patterns.

evidence: Prisma models AuditLog, Experiment, ExperimentAssignment, ExperimentResult define @@map tables: audit_logs, experiments, experiment_assignments, experiment_results
None of these 4 tables appear in the Supabase snapshot SQL
drift.sql confirms CreateTable statements needed for all 4
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Run prisma migrate to create these 4 tables, or remove the models if they are not yet needed.

evidence: DB: workspaces.plan column type is text with DEFAULT 'free'
Prisma: Workspace.plan is PlanTier enum @default(STARTER)
Type change from text to enum will fail without USING clause on existing 'free' values
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Migration must include explicit USING cast: ALTER COLUMN plan TYPE PlanTier USING (CASE WHEN plan = 'free' THEN 'STARTER' ELSE 'STARTER' END)::PlanTier

evidence: 25 models have tenantId String field but no Tenant @relation declaration
Without @relation, Prisma cannot generate FK constraint at ORM layer
5 of these (Case, CaseTask, Appointment, AutoResponseDraft, ChainVersion) have DB-level FK that Prisma will DROP
affected_objects: 25 models with tenantId but no Tenant @relation — see DBA-118 for full list
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade) to each affected model. Prioritize legal domain (Case, CaseTask, Appointment) to prevent FK regression.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Duplicate of DBA-118. All 25 models now have Tenant @relation + FK constraints in DB.

evidence: 19 DB tables have tenantId NOT NULL but Prisma models omit the field entirely
Subsumes original DBA-011 list — the DB is broader than originally audited
See DBA-117 for the complete list of 19 tables
affected_objects: 19 tables — see DBA-117 for full list
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add tenantId String + Tenant @relation to all 19 Prisma models. DO NOT run prisma migrate dev as-is — it would DROP these columns.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Duplicate of DBA-117. All 19 models now have tenantId + Tenant @relation in Prisma. prisma migrate diff shows zero tenantId drift.

evidence: Cross-tenant FK references without composite (tenantId + entityId) guards
Opportunity.accountId, Task.contactId, Task.accountId, CalendarEvent.contactId
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add composite FK constraints that include tenantId to prevent cross-tenant references.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: TicketCategory has @@unique([name]) — global uniqueness across all tenants
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Change @@unique([name]) to @@unique([tenantId, name]).

evidence: Most tenantId-scoped entities lack tenant-scoped uniqueness constraints
affected_objects: Multiple models with tenantId but no composite unique constraints
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Audit all unique constraints to ensure they include tenantId.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: WebhookEndpoint.secret: String — stored as plaintext in DB
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Encrypt webhook secrets at the application layer before storing.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: CallRecord stores phoneNumber, recordingUrl, transcription — PII requiring encryption review
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Evaluate PII encryption for GDPR/CCPA compliance.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: IP addresses stored as plaintext String in SecurityEvent, AuditLogEntry, CaseDocumentAudit
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Hash or encrypt IP addresses at rest.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: ChainVersion.prompt and ChainVersion.systemPrompt stored as plaintext
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Consider encrypting prompts at rest.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: ConsentRecord.permissionGranted Boolean @default(true) violates privacy-by-default (GDPR Art 25)
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Change default to false. Consent should be opt-in.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: False positive: ConsentRecord.permissionGranted @default(true) is Prisma-only default for insert convenience. Actual GDPR consent is enforced at application layer before record creation.

evidence: Contact.email has @@unique([email]) — enables cross-tenant email enumeration
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Change to @@unique([tenantId, email]).

evidence: CaseDocument, CaseDocumentACL, CaseDocumentAudit use snake_case columns (39 fields total)
All other 110+ models use camelCase
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Rename to camelCase or add @map() annotations.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: 5 Legal domain models use @default(uuid()), 108 others use @default(cuid())
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Standardize on one ID strategy or document the Legal domain exception.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: Mixed money types: Decimal @db.Decimal(15,2) vs Int (cents)
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Pick one canonical money representation.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: Status fields using String instead of enum: ConversationRecord, ToolCallRecord, ReportExecution
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Create proper Prisma enums for each.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: 5 models use sentiment as String but Sentiment enum already exists
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Replace all 5 sentiment String fields with the existing Sentiment enum.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: ToolCallRecord has duplicate field pairs: toolInput/inputParameters, toolOutput/outputResult, duration/durationMs
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Consolidate each pair, migrate data, remove deprecated columns.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: ZepEpisodeUsage uses lastUpdated @updatedAt instead of updatedAt convention
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Rename to updatedAt.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: DomainEvent uses 'tenants' (plural) for Tenant @relation field
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Rename to 'tenant' (singular).

evidence: SecurityEventType and EventOutcome enums declared but never referenced by any model
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Wire to SecurityEvent.eventType or delete unused enums.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: Permission, NotificationPreference, ExperimentResult have no @@map — defaults to PascalCase tables
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add @@map with snake_case table names.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: False positive: Permission, NotificationPreference, and ExperimentResult intentionally use PascalCase table names to match Prisma convention. @@map is not required when table name matches model name.

evidence: ChainVersion has activatedAt/activatedBy and deprecatedAt/deprecatedBy but no archivedBy for archivedAt
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add archivedBy String? for At/By symmetry.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: TicketNextStep.dueDate: String stores display labels instead of DateTime
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Change to DateTime? and compute display labels at application layer.
confirmed_findings.resolution_note: Resolved in batch 3: schema edits + migration applied.

evidence: drift.sql AlterTable teams: ADD COLUMN tenantId TEXT NOT NULL
drift.sql AlterTable team_members: ADD COLUMN tenantId TEXT NOT NULL
Snapshot confirms teams/team_members have NO tenantId column
Prisma Team model has tenantId String NOT NULL with @relation to Tenant
This is the INVERSE of original DBA-008 finding — Prisma has it, DB doesn't
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Migration must: (1) ADD COLUMN tenantId TEXT, (2) backfill from workspace tenant, (3) SET NOT NULL, (4) add FK + index. Cannot use simple ADD COLUMN NOT NULL on non-empty tables.

evidence: DB: workspaces.plan = text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free'
Prisma: Workspace.plan = PlanTier enum @default(STARTER)
Existing 'free' values have no PlanTier equivalent — migration will fail without USING clause
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Migration must include USING cast mapping 'free' to 'STARTER'.

evidence: FeedbackSurvey.type uses SurveyType enum in DB, FeedbackType enum in Prisma
drift.sql renames SurveyType → FeedbackType via CREATE/ALTER/DROP cycle
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Verify SurveyType and FeedbackType share identical values before applying enum rename.

evidence: drift.sql adds ARCHIVED value to TicketStatus enum
Additive change — no existing rows affected
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Safe to apply. The BEGIN/COMMIT block correctly handles the enum swap.

evidence: ai_output_review_audit.actorType: DB has text, Prisma has ActorType enum
drift.sql uses DROP COLUMN + ADD COLUMN approach which DESTROYS existing data
Should use ALTER COLUMN TYPE ... USING cast instead
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Replace DROP+ADD with: ALTER COLUMN actorType TYPE ActorType USING actorType::ActorType to preserve audit data.

evidence: auto_response_drafts: drift.sql DROP COLUMN messageId, sendError, sentAt
DB has these columns with data; Prisma model does not declare them
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Verify no application code depends on sentAt/sendError/messageId before allowing DROP. If IFC-029 email tracking needs these, add them back to Prisma.

evidence: lead_notes: drift.sql DROP COLUMN embedding (vector), search_vector (tsvector)
ContactNote retains both fields — inconsistent treatment
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Verify dropping vector search on lead notes is intentional. If needed, add fields back to Prisma schema.

evidence: cases, case_tasks, chain_versions: drift.sql drops DB DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP on updatedAt
Prisma @updatedAt handles this at ORM layer
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Safe if all writes go through Prisma. Document that direct SQL needs explicit updatedAt.

evidence: lead_activities.description: DB has NOT NULL, Prisma has String? (nullable)
Schema relaxation — backward compatible
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Verify application code handles null description values.

evidence: drift.sql: DropForeignKey appointments_tenantId_fkey
DB has FK but Prisma Appointment model has no Tenant @relation
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add Tenant @relation to Appointment model to preserve FK integrity.

evidence: drift.sql: DropForeignKey cases_tenantId_fkey, case_tasks_tenantId_fkey
Legal domain models losing DB-enforced tenant isolation
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add Tenant @relation to Case and CaseTask models. Legal domain requires strictest isolation.

evidence: drift.sql: DropForeignKey auto_response_drafts_tenantId_fkey, auto_response_drafts_leadId_fkey
Both FKs exist in DB but Prisma lacks @relation declarations
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add both Tenant and Lead @relation declarations to AutoResponseDraft.

evidence: drift.sql: DropForeignKey chain_versions_parentVersionId_fkey
DB has self-referential FK for version tree integrity; Prisma lacks @relation
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add self-referential @relation to ChainVersion for parentVersionId.

evidence: drift.sql wants to DROP COLUMN tenantId from 19 tables
All 19 tables have tenantId TEXT NOT NULL in the DB snapshot
Prisma models for these tables have NO tenantId field

Applying migration as-is would destroy tenant isolation on: api_keys, business_rules, business_rule_executions, chat_conversations, dashboard_configs, deals_won_metrics, document_access_logs, document_shares, documents, email_attachments, report_executions, report_schedules, sla_notifications, ticket_attachments, ticket_categories, webhook_deliveries, webhook_endpoints, workflow_definitions, workflow_executions
confirmed_findings.recommendation: DO NOT apply DROP COLUMN tenantId. Add tenantId String + Tenant @relation to each Prisma model. Priority: (1) webhook_endpoints/deliveries + document tables, (2) business rules + workflows, (3) dashboard/reporting.

evidence: 25 Prisma models have tenantId String but no Tenant @relation declaration
No FK constraint generated at ORM layer for these
5 of these have DB-level FK that Prisma will DROP (Case, CaseTask, Appointment, AutoResponseDraft, ChainVersion)
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add Tenant @relation to all 25 models. Prioritize legal (Case, CaseTask, Appointment) and security (UserRoleAssignment, UserPermission).

evidence: SecurityEvent: no composite (tenantId, createdAt) index despite being high-volume time-series table
Only individual indexes on tenantId, createdAt, eventType, severity
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add @@index([tenantId, createdAt]) and @@index([tenantId, eventType]).

evidence: ChainVersionAudit: no composite (versionId, performedAt) index for version history queries
NotificationDeliveryLog: no composite (notificationId, attemptedAt) index
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add composite indexes for history-ordered queries.

evidence: Task model: no @@index([opportunityId]) despite FK field
EscalationHistory: no indexes on fromUserId, toUserId
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add @@index([opportunityId]) to Task, @@index([toUserId]) to EscalationHistory.

evidence: AIOutputReview: losing composite tenantId+status index from DB
Prisma schema only has individual indexes — review queue page needs composite
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add @@index([tenantId, status]) and @@index([tenantId, slaDeadline]).

evidence: LeadConversionAudit: contactId and accountId have no indexes
AccountHealthScore: no composite (accountId, calculatedAt) for time-series
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add @@index([contactId]) and @@index([accountId]) to LeadConversionAudit. Add @@index([accountId, calculatedAt]) to AccountHealthScore.

evidence: DomainEvent: no @@index([tenantId, status]) for tenant-scoped event processing
WorkflowExecution: no @@index([workflowId, startedAt]) for history ordering
confirmed_findings.recommendation: Add composite indexes for common query patterns.

evidence: Multiple priority fields using String with inconsistent defaults across different enums
needs_review_findings.recommendation: Consider shared Priority enum or document per-domain differences.

evidence: Inconsistent timestamp field naming: timestamp vs createdAt vs performedAt
Mixed soft-delete approaches: deleted_at timestamp vs DELETED/ARCHIVED status enum
UserRoleAssignment and UserPermission have userId with no User @relation
Vector and tsvector columns lack HNSW/GIN indexes in Prisma schema
needs_review_findings.recommendation: Add specialized indexes via raw SQL migration.

evidence: Audit tables are append-only with no retention index or partitioning
Notification model has 7 indexes — write amplification concern
needs_review_findings.recommendation: Evaluate which indexes are needed, consider composites.

evidence: Task.leadId and Task.opportunityId FK fields lack dedicated indexes
needs_review_findings.recommendation: Add indexes if these are common query patterns.

migration_backlog.description: URGENT: Add tenantId String + Tenant @relation to 19 Prisma models where DB has tenantId NOT NULL but Prisma omits it. DO NOT run prisma migrate dev until this is fixed — it would DROP tenantId columns.
Add Tenant @relation to 25 models that have tenantId String but no @relation. Prioritize Case, CaseTask, Appointment (DB FK will be dropped otherwise).
Add tenantId to teams/team_members DB tables. Requires backfill strategy for NOT NULL column on non-empty tables.
Fix data-destructive migration patterns: (1) actorType DROP+ADD → USING cast, (2) verify auto_response_drafts columns needed, (3) verify lead_notes vector fields needed.
Preserve existing DB FK constraints by adding @relation declarations to Prisma models (Appointment, Case, CaseTask, AutoResponseDraft, ChainVersion).
Create 4 missing DB tables (audit_logs, experiments, experiment_assignments, experiment_results) or remove Prisma models.
Fix enum type changes: workspaces.plan text→PlanTier (needs USING cast), FeedbackSurvey.type SurveyType→FeedbackType (verify value compatibility).
Add missing composite performance indexes across 8+ models.
Replace String status/sentiment fields with proper enums, wire unused enums.
Architectural decisions (ADR): CaseDocument snake_case, uuid/cuid standardization, money type.
Security hardening: encrypt secrets/PII, hash IPs, fix consent default.
